programme.title: Major Crimes: Dead Zone
programme.desc: While investigating a murder that has personal implications for Sanchez, the squad uncovers a much larger criminal operation. Meanwhile, Buzz comes face to face with someone that may have been present at his father's murder.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Fake It 'til You Make It
programme.desc: After a body turns up in Boston with links to another murder in Los Angeles, Jane and Maura pack up their sunscreen and hop on a plane. With the girls out of town, Angela and Korsak plan a double date with Kiki and Ron.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Killer in High Heels
programme.desc: Maura becomes the key suspect in a homicide case when her date turns up dead and Maura can't remember the evening. Jane struggles between protecting her friend and doing her job.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: No One Mourns the Wicked
programme.desc: Jane faces her memories when she and Maura present the case of serial killer Charles Hoyt at a symposium. As they begin their simulation of the investigation, a horrifying discovery leads to a game of cat and mouse with a new serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.desc: She was a pre-med student on her way to becoming a surgeon, but the trauma of being molested as a child and her parents' brutal divorce haunted Allison. She started to inhale computer dust remover, which is potentially fatal with each breath.

programme.title: Intervention: Brittany
programme.desc: Brittany once dreamed of becoming a police officer to protect people from the traumas that she faced as a child. But at 22, her goal is slipping away. She's a heroin addict who sells her body to get her next high.

programme.title: Intervention: Sarah/ Mikeal
programme.desc: Like Romeo and Juliet on heroin, Mikeal and Sarah are a poor boy and a rich girl who have found solace in each other's pain.

programme.title: Intervention: Susie and Miriam
programme.desc: These attractive and charismatic 41-year-old twins battle crack and alcohol addictions and each other as their career success and families slowly slip away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn
programme.desc: Chris, Wes, and Alex convince Eric to finally trade in his Minivan. Plus, the boys rock some Shock Collar Magic, Wes throws axes, and we introduce The Great Ramsini.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster
programme.desc: The chefs replicate Orange Chicken from Panda Express for Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.desc: Find out how a little eye makeup can help you pull off a prank that's both hilarious and scary. Plus, watch things go downhill in a hurry when people try to back that thang up.

programme.desc: Learn why playing with fire is still a bad idea, see who has the fastest Rubik's Cube hands underwater, and the latest on the dad bod craze that's taking over the world.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All About Meme

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught in the Crossfire
programme.desc: Suspicions flare when stray bullets strike an elderly couple's home and their neighbors are questioned. Game Wardens Raj Ataya and Clint Caywood rush to help an injured boater, and an overnight kayak patrol reveals campers throwing caution to the wind.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bracing for Impact
programme.desc: On the Gulf of Mexico, a routine inspection turns treacherous for Game Warden Carmen Rickel and the Marine Tactical Operations Group. Warden Kyle Hadley wrangles a rattlesnake found in a home, and underaged boaters are busted for alcohol on deck.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Actions Have Consequences
programme.desc: Game Warden James Cummings arrives at the scene of a domestic dispute, only to discover the man has a warrant out for his arrest. During water patrols, a fisherman is caught empty handed, and a couple with their baby are kayaking without life jackets.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: No License to Kill
programme.desc: Foolhardy speedsters run afoul of wardens on a nighttime stakeout mission. Game Warden Mike Boone investigates reckless gunfire endangering life and property, and Game Warden Chelsea Bailey crosses paths with a wanted man during a routine safety check.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Illegal Possession
programme.desc: A fisherman is caught in possession of more than just fish. Later, Game Warden Randolph McGee confiscates an illegal pet raccoon, and a trespassing complaint escalates when two game wardens stumble upon a group carrying cocaine.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Illegal Possession
programme.desc: A fisherman is caught in possession of more than just fish. Later, Game Warden Randolph McGee confiscates an illegal pet raccoon, and a trespassing complaint escalates when two game wardens stumble upon a group carrying cocaine.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: No License to Kill
programme.desc: Foolhardy speedsters run afoul of wardens on a nighttime stakeout mission. Game Warden Mike Boone investigates reckless gunfire endangering life and property, and Game Warden Chelsea Bailey crosses paths with a wanted man during a routine safety check.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Legacy Continues
programme.desc: After months of training, Robert steps into his father's shoes to feed Graham, Australia Zoo's most notorious crocodile, solo, in front of the entire Crocoseum. Bindi witnesses one of nature's rarest events: Cedar the Koala has given birth to twins.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tortoise First Date
programme.desc: Love is in the air at Australia Zoo. Terri helps determine if Caballe the Rhino is pregnant, while Robert matchmakes with Coconut and Goliath, the Zoo's Aldabra giant tortoises.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Return to the Big Island
programme.desc: A year after finding his father's fishing charts, Josh and Casey return to Hawaii to grow their fledgling fishing business. Finding an industry in ruin, they join with business partner, Jeff Silva, to devise a strategy to navigate the waters ahead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Welcome to Alaska
programme.desc: Travel deep within the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge and get the inside scoop from the last Alaskan families to call it home, and the production crew that joined them within its 19 million acres of wilderness to film the docuseries, 'The Last Alaskans.'

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Origin Story
programme.desc: Waah survives poverty, violence and hustling on the streets of New York and sets his sites on making it in the music business.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: The Rise of Ruff Ryders
programme.desc: The Deans build Ruff Ryders at Powerhouse Studios in Yonkers. DMX signs with Def Jam and makes history releasing two multi-platinum albums in one year. DMX and Ruff Ryders revolutionize hip-hop with the sound of the street.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Money, Power, Respect
programme.desc: With an Interscope distribution deal, the Deans expand Ruff Ryders, signing Eve, Drag-on and The Lox. Waah launches a lifestyle brand and national motorcycle chapters. As Ruff Ryders soar, fame takes a steep toll on DMX.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Ryde of Die
programme.desc: Ruff Ryders and Cash Money join forces for an historic tour. The tour sells out, but a key sponsor bails, leaving the Deans to bankroll the venture. Then, at the peak of Ruff Ryders' success, Dee nearly dies in a high-speed crash.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Ruff Ryders Forever
programme.desc: Ruff Ryders reels after Dee's crash. Waah manages talent exodus, contraction of music biz, and expands lifestyle brand. He reboots the label, focuses on the next generation of rappers, bikers and giving back to the community.

programme.title: Movie: The Family That Preys

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Moonwalking
programme.desc: Someone brings in a flag from NASA's final mission to the moon autographed by the crew of Apollo 16. Rick is presented with an 1861 Civil War Colt musket that is mysteriously perfect in every detail.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Going Postal
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an American postage printing plate from 1862. A guy comes in with a rare recording of a speech by Martin Luther King Jr. given just months before his assassination.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Wright Stuff
programme.desc: An 1830s percussion musket from West Point marches into the shop. A guy soars in with a collection of letters and pilot licenses signed by the father of flight, Orville Wright.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Say It Ain't So
programme.desc: The guys check out a Savage Navy pistol, and Corey and Chum orbit a Moonman statue from the MTV Video Music Awards.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Off the Hook
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sketches from the 1954 Sam Sheppard trial. The man who inspired 'The Fugitive,' is Rick willing to deliver a verdict on these rare drawings?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mini Rick
programme.desc: A broadside from the civil war era comes into the shop as well as a 1947 fully restored Wurlitzer jukebox. Later, Rick gets frustrated when Chumlee brings a child to the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Last Call Pawn
programme.desc: Corey tests a Line Drive Pinball Machine and Rick checks out an 1895 Morgan Dollar.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Hot Dam
programme.desc: Concert posters signed by Johnny Cash and Stevie Ray Vaughn arrive at the shop as well as original blue prints from the Hoover Dam.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Locked and Loaded
programme.desc: A 1763 flintlock pistol fires into the shop. Then, Rick scopes out an 1890s telescope cane. Rick and Chumlee venture to a galaxy far, far away to see some 'Star Wars' props.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Godfather of Pawn
programme.desc: A James Brown suit dances into the shop and it's a game of cat and mouse when Corey and Chum check out an artist proof from the film 'Anchors Aweigh'.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Every Rose Has Its Pawn
programme.desc: An original sketch of the Marine Corps War Memorial; a Poison platinum disc signed by Bret Michaels; a Roman oil lamp from the first century lights its way in; a Military certificate from the Vietnam War.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: G.I. Pawn
programme.desc: Two rare G.I. Joe playsets, a 1950s Chinese military motorcycle, a photograph and letter signed by poet Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, and an antique Black and Decker drill.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: My Country, Pawn of Thee
programme.desc: Handwritten lyrics to 'My Country, Tis of Thee'; a WWII era Linemar Space Explorer Toy; a United Nations Helmet from Somalia; a giant bell from the classic El Rancho Hotel and Casino.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Megawatt Money
programme.desc: Two signed David Carradine replica swords; first edition of T.S Eliot's 'Four Quartets'; a 1965 Battle of the Bulge board game; a 1920s radium crock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Houston, We Have A Deal
programme.desc: A lunar Bible from Apollo 14; a 1930s Buck Rogers Disintegrator Gun; miniature samples of a 1950s kitchen; a 1950s Beetle Bailey original print.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lock Stock and Two Nickel Barrels
programme.desc: A rare movie poster for John Wanye's first ever film is offered to Rick for a hefty price. Chum inspects a pair of nickel-plated pistols whose creator is claimed to be the Victorian era's most famous gun maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Masonic Pawn
programme.desc: Rick gets his hands on a hat worn by Prince and considers the sale. An Egyptian scarab ring scuttles into the shop for evaluation. A WWII era head-shaped glass planter also visits the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wish-A-Pawn a Star
programme.desc: The Gold and Silver turns into the happiest place on earth when a seller brings in some vintage Disneyland employee costumes. A Volkswagen space patrol toy car sends Rick over the moon, but the price tag has him seeing stars.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn It Out of the Park
programme.desc: Rick heads east to test a rare weapon from the 18th century. Back at the shop, Corey takes a swing at a Mickey Mantle rookie card. Then, our military expert Alex brews something special for Rick's eyes only.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Wasteland

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets of the Transcontinental
programme.desc: America's transcontinental railroad helped transform the United States into a global superpower, and today, cutting-edge engineering is behind hi-tech railways to once again revolutionize travel from sea to shining sea.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets of the Transcontinental
programme.desc: America's transcontinental railroad helped transform the United States into a global superpower, and today, cutting-edge engineering is behind hi-tech railways to once again revolutionize travel from sea to shining sea.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Stories on this episode include the face of Christ is found in a field in Hungary, a photo that claims to show who shot down a passenger jet in Ukraine and a sinister shape in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads investigators to a hidden genocide.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Strange Symbols in the Desert
programme.desc: An amateur archaeologist stumbles upon strange symbols scratched into the Kazakhstan Desert. CIA surveillance photographs show what looks like a giant Star of David on the island of Cuba. A lake in the Brazilian rain forest has turned bright pink.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Is Burning
programme.desc: Military analysts are concerned about a possible smoke screen over North Korea. Then, amateur archaeologists have discovered what could be two forgotten pyramids in Egypt via satellite image.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Riddle in the Ruins
programme.desc: Strange black holes appear near Egypt's ancient pyramids, and new evidence points to a disturbing conclusion. Ruins in Peru suggests that the Inca people knew far more than previously thought. A mysterious red swarm invades a beach in India.

programme.title: White Rabbit Project: Scam Artists
programme.desc: Kari, Tory and Grant compare notes on six big-time scammers, including a swindling Swiss gigolo and the man who put Ponzi schemes on the map.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.desc: Michael and Rebecca Hargon vanish from their Mississippi home along with their young son. When investigators discover Michael has recently come into an inheritance, they are forced to confront the idea that his recent good fortune may be a factor.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crowded House
programme.desc: Lonely teen Jessica Sacco turns to the internet to find other so-called 'Juggalos' who share her interests in edgy music. There, she makes new friends and even finds a boyfriend. She moves in with them, and soon finds herself unable to escape their grip.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: An Iowa mother is hailed a hero when she shoots an intruder in her home. But as the case evolves, investigators learn things are far from what they seem. Detectives face off against a master manipulator hell-bent on revenge at any cost.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Every Step You Take
programme.desc: College dancer Jodi Sanderholm has spent weeks practicing her team's big performance. So when she vanishes hours before the event, it doesn't make sense - until a friend comes forward with strange details about the days leading up to Jodi's disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trouble in Quitman
programme.desc: When police find a mother and her son shot to death in their home in a small town in Texas, questions arise over whether the husband may have been behind the deaths.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Rocky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: A red hot affair leads to a dangerous combination of lust, greed, and pride, but a loving family does nothing to quell a man's illicit desires. And later, when two lost souls try to start over in the wilds of Idaho, it leads to a deadly twist of betrayal.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Dear Katherine, It's Me the Killer
programme.desc: When 18-year-old freshman Katherine Foster goes missing, terror strikes the heart of the University of South Alabama. Has she been abducted? Raped? Is there a killer in their midst? Rumors fly, as students fear the worst ... anyone could be next.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Slow Burn
programme.desc: Tammy Lohr is a file clerk who is seduced by a decorated and very married cop. Things heat up when his wife receives an anonymous letter revealing the affair followed by a mysterious fire, a brutal stabbing and an elaborate plot to cover it up.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns
programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.desc: Robert takes the team to tobacco country where they tackle a cigarette factory, without an elevator, on the hottest day of the year. With the Dawg Bowl opening just around the corner, Mike and Tay shift their focus to a lovable piece for the venue.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dream Deck With a Cozy Feel
programme.desc: Garth and the team face a huge challenge transforming a rickety, unsafe deck into a two-story masterpiece with a stone kitchen and bar, fire and water features and a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Mega Decks: The Ultimate Luxury Deck with a Two-Story Waterfall
programme.desc: A couple challenges the crew to build a deck that maximizes their gorgeous views, and adds 1000 square feet of outdoor living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Scenic Overlook With a Private Deck
programme.desc: The team plans to create a large enclosed space that homeowners can enjoy throughout the year. As a retaining wall is uncovered, the plans for expansion come into question. They also battle cold, icy terrain and a 25-foot cliff.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventure brings him to Detroit for the famous Detroit-style, Sicilian square pan pizza.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cleveland, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food frenzy brings him to Cleveland, Ohio, for a corned beef colossus, a caramel ice cream sundae at a sweet time machine and an Olympic-sized gyro in the Greek Village Grille's Mount Olympus Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Latin Fiesta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels coast to coast sampling the best carnival creations inspired by the cuisine of Latin America. This fiesta of food features both classic and crazy carnival treats, from Tex-Mex to traditional.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson turns the clock back to being a kid, when life was simpler, and food tasted better. So, enjoy a blast from the past while we revisit some childhood favorites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness

programme.desc: Gibbs and his team investigate when a Marine's wife kills her attempted rapist.

programme.title: NCIS: Chained
programme.desc: The team must work together to find Tony when he disappears during an undercover job.

programme.title: NCIS: Blackwater
programme.desc: The team investigates when the body of a naval officer is found at the bottom of a lake.

programme.title: NCIS: Doppelganger
programme.desc: A telemarketer reports a possible murder of a petty officer who appeared to be dying over the phone. With the help of the Virginia officials, the team finds out it was just a practical joke. However, the person is soon found dead.

programme.title: NCIS: The Meat Puzzle
programme.desc: Ducky makes a shocking discovery when he identifies three bodies found in some barrels.

programme.title: NCIS: Witness
programme.desc: Gibbs gives McGee a chance to run a case when NCIS is called in to investigate a murder.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Killshot
programme.desc: When a United States citizen of North Korean descent is murdered, the secrets to classified software are thought to be lost until NCIS uncovers a suspect from Director Vance's past.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: The team must find a motive when they discover the body of a marine who has been living a double life as a wealthy bachelor.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Pushback
programme.desc: Following the murder of a Russian woman, The NCIS team uncovers evidence that answers who and why Callen was shot six months ago.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Stress Position
programme.desc: A prison guard's murder exposes a corrupt Brooklyn prison system.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Death Roe
programme.desc: A promising chef mysteriously disappears after the murder of a restaurant critic.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Ex Stasis

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash Valley Extended Stay: Skitz
programme.desc: A routine cell search reveals an inmate on the edge, and prison officials intervene. And we turn some of our cameras over to the inmates for a personal glimpse of their lives in prison.

programme.title: Lockup: Santa Rosa Extended Stay: Warriors
programme.desc: The prison takes on a military-style feel both for the inmates and the officers. A gang unit investigation turns up the heat on a pair of cellmates, before one turns on the other.

programme.title: Lockup: Raw: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Our producers see it in every booking department of every jail we visit: newly arrested men and women so drunk or high, they're a danger to themselves or others. For some addiction leads to serious crimes to support their habits.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: The New Girl
programme.desc: Deputies respond to rising tensions in a female housing unit; a popular rapper, whose ups and downs have been chronicled in the Oakland media, now faces serious charges; a grandmother, convicted of a mortgage scam, finds her place in the inmate hierarchy.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Twisted Connection
programme.desc: When a suburban mom is murdered in her own home, investigators chase down an elusive killer that no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Intentions
programme.desc: When a devoted mother about to embark on a new life is murdered in her own home, detectives follow the evidence through a tangled web of relationships to unmask a killer no one could have predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Mexico Massacre
programme.desc: A beloved couple and their special needs son are savagely murdered in rural New Mexico, leading detectives to uncover long buried secrets in a tight-knit town.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desolate Towns of the Damned
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a backwoods Kentucky town and a deserted Spanish village with a bloody past are now abandoned ruins; experts investigate the mysteries of these deserted cities to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town
programme.desc: A strange deserted city in America's heartland, an eerie gigantic wall deep in snow-capped mountains, and a mysterious top-secret Soviet facility were built and then abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Floating Pyramid
programme.desc: Surrounded by a mysterious trench, only one Egyptian pyramid was ever constructed to look like it floats on water; using pioneering drone-scanning technology, experts decode the ancient secrets of the pharaoh that are locked inside its hidden tunnels.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Draining the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge tech is helping experts investigate the mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle like never before, and as new discoveries reveal alien phenomena at the bottom of the ocean floor, they might finally uncover the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: House of Holy Relics
programme.desc: A medieval engineering marvel might be the home to the remains of the Bible's Three Magi, and we follow the scientists and experts who are delving deep into the mysteries of this incredible religious site.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Hindenburg
programme.desc: When the Nazi airship Hindenburg exploded in a giant ball of fire, the world's largest aircraft in history became one of its greatest catastrophes, and now, new technology might finally reveal what caused the fatal crash and if it was an act of sabotage.

programme.desc: A woman is murdered the same night she's supposed to go out with rising star, Ashton Kutcher. Police believe the clues point to a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Sound of Silence
programme.desc: Gallaudet University is America's premier college for the deaf, but this haven for higher learning is turned upside down when two students are murdered in their dorm rooms. Investigators dive into campus life and reveal a serial killer in the making.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Retiree Alex Strategos moves to Florida to be closer to his son, but loneliness consumes him. He turns to internet dating and finds 69 year-old Melissa, but is soon struck by a rush of unexplained illnesses.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Secret Rendezvous
programme.desc: When a night out ends in bloodshed for 23-year-old Navy veteran Raul Mendoza, Houston police have a lot of questions on their hands. But a tip from Raul's sister soon reveals that someone police have met before may hold the answers.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: A Dark Place to Die
programme.desc: 36-year-old Kimra Riley heads to a Sheffield, Alabama bar looking for fun and soon finds something far more sinister. Two months later, her body is found tangled up on the banks of the Tennessee River. Can police bring justice to this single mom's family?

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Lake of Lies
programme.desc: Investigators must cast a wide net for clues when the family of Breckenridge resident Sharon Garrison report her missing. There's evidence to suggest she's skipped town, but a set of secret cassette tapes soon point to something far more sinister.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Christina Woods was reported missing by her mother Mary. Detectives uncover a complicated web involving Christina's husband Troy, her best friend Brooke and Brooke's husband Dan. Her body was found 600 miles away.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: Daniel Ott is just one day from moving with his girlfriend when an intruder shoots him dead with a shotgun. A stunning coincidence will lead the investigation into the heart of one of the most dangerous criminal rings in the country...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Jump Shot
programme.desc: Hollywood 'golden boy' Gavin Smith, a 20th Century Fox executive and former star UCLA basketball player goes missing. For years, his family and detectives search tirelessly for answers, but a group of heartless characters holds fast to their secrets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith... in a burglar. Then...Cherie Bradley and her ex-boyfriend Anthony Carroll are found dead, and it's up to Kenda to discover which of their relatives did it.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Kross Kountry Kriminal
programme.desc: Charlotte, NC Homicide Detective Garry McFadden must delve into the dark world of White Supremacy in order to take down a slippery murder suspect who flees town and leads the investigator on a cross-country chase.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Collision Course
programme.desc: A young Iraq war veteran dies in a wreck that left her ex-boyfriend unhurt but the crash is not what killed her. A wife's secret recordings may have the answers to what really happened.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls
programme.desc: Tensions arise when a new addition to the Finkle family shakes up their peaceful dynamic, but no one could predict the fatal and gruesome results to come.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Bad Seeds
programme.desc: Robert and Stephen Spahalski are identical twins that terrorized upstate New York: one twin was put behind bars for murder and the other became a serial killer.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Murder Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Police find a cast of dangerous characters and uncover a heinous plot in the murder of a single mother.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.desc: Stylish and casual cold weather footwears, sleepwear and accessories.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Daggett Camp
programme.desc: Chase and team take on the Daggett Camp, which was owned by a famous Maine politician whose family wants to rehab it in only six weeks. A hidden surprise underneath the cabin threatens to derail the whole project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cascades Inn
programme.desc: The Dawgs take on a salvage in Bath County, Virginia, at the Cascades Inn, and the historic property provides many reclaimable items. Back at the shop, Mike works with the crew to give modern functionality to a customer's family heirloom.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tuna, Surprise!
programme.desc: Alton Brown raises the bar on canned tuna beyond the usual casserole or tuna sandwich.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fermentation Nation
programme.desc: Alton thinks outside the bottle by using beer and wine as key ingredients to prepare several tasty dishes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Another Man Food Show: Breakfast
programme.desc: Alton helps an average Joe whip up a classic breakfast of bacon, eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics X: Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Alton Brown makes the argument that Italian food was actually invented in America, and that chicken parmesan is the dish where it all began. Yet, an Italian canned tomato makes it all possible.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: St. Louis
programme.desc: Andrew heads to St. Louis to get his fill of comfort food. He savors barbecued pig snoots, indulges in a modern Midwestern incarnation of traditional Italian fare and slurps noodles at one of the hottest new spots for East Asian fare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Zagreb
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the fairytale-like city of Zagreb, Croatia. The city's cuisine has a meat-centric menu and celebrates iconic dishes like porky kotlovina, tender veal cheeks and savory stuffed peppers.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Bronx
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the international flavors of one of America's most diverse communities, the Bronx, New York. He finds Italian-influenced bites like dry-aged pork sausage, spicy Jamaican meat pastries and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.
