programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Backyard BBQ
programme.desc: Michael McKean knows that where there's smoke, there's barbecue and he's ready to put the heat to the meat. He's learning how barbecue can boost brainpower, discovering Korean barbecue is anything but and explaining why barbecue brisket may be blessed.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Tea Time
programme.desc: Michael McKean has his pinkie out because it's tea time! He's discovering espionage may have bagged us English breakfast, the egg salad sandwich has some complicated chemistry and that matcha tea may be pulling a fast one.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Into The Wild
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds his bearings and heads out into the wild blue yonder. On this appetizing adventure, he'll discover if a classic cobbler helped Lewis and Clark, and whether Girl Scout cookies can save the planet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Paradise Nosh
programme.desc: Michael McKean finds out how poke started cooking without gas, why the Mai Tai became tied to tiki bars and if Hawaiian pizza is from the great white north.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Summertime
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean is ready to roll out those lazy days of summer the right way with our favorite summertime dishes! He contemplates if ceviche is really cooked, whether gazpacho came from the Good Book and what the cake in strawberry shortcake is.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: My Kind Of Town
programme.desc: Michael McKean is taking us on a wild ride through the Windy City. He's going to determine if Chicago deep dish is definitely pizza, if brownies are just fancy fair food and he'll shed some light on saganaki's flames.

programme.title: Good Eats: Hittin' the Sauce
programme.desc: Alton Brown simplifies the most common sauce quarries.

programme.title: Good Eats: Shell Game III: Oysters
programme.desc: Oysters are a mystery to many and downright spooky to some. Join host Alton Brown as he unravels the secrets of this bivalve, cracks a safe or two and reinvents classic applications.

programme.title: Good Eats: Olive Me
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the flavourful little olive, which has changed the course of history.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid VI: Lentils
programme.desc: Whether it's soup, salad, or baked goods, the lentil has more to offer than fibre, minerals, and a steak's worth of protein.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bowl O' Bayou
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown sheds light on Cajun and Creole, and comes up with a method for making a brick roux and the perfect gumbo.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Seafood
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases fifteen of the most delightfully decadent dishes from around America. From bacon brownies to chicken fried lobster, they're the type of savory pleasures and sweet sensations that make everyone long for 'cheat day'.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: M. Asam Beauty
programme.desc: Discover anti-aging skin products with the power of grapeseed oil, from German family-owned M. Asam. Being one of the most successful TV shopping brands in Europe, M. Asam now brings its grapeseed-based products and skincare treatments to the US.

programme.desc: These handbags and accessories are crafted to weather the seasons in designs and in an array of colors as distinctive as the people who carry them.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Fear Window / The Dog House
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: Long Tongue Day / Doggy Da Vinci
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Escape From Phineas Tower/ The Remains of the Platypus
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb are inspired by an antique escape chamber to build a computer-controlled tower that allows them to explore the world of escapement. Craziness is going rampant in Danville, but no one has any idea what is going on.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crank It Up
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Mirror/ Cricket's Tickets
programme.desc: When the Greens visit BigTech, Tilly jumps at the chance to test Gwendolyn Zapp's new technology, which promises to make them the "perfect family." Cricket wins tickets to a show and must decide whether to bring Tilly or Remy.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Little Frogtown/ Hopping Mall
programme.desc: Hop Pop investigates the disappearance of an old friend and the shadowy crime syndicate he suspects are behind it. Hop Pop takes the kids to a Newtopian shopping mall to buy souvenirs, and Anne will do anything to get the perfect gift for her mom.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cries and Dolls/ Hypnosferatu
programme.desc: Mavis' dreams are haunted by a familiar foe. Mavis attempts to master the art of vampnosis.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Northern Frights/ Don't Fear the Realtor
programme.desc: Uncle Gene's been invited to a performance of the Northern Frights! Maggie the ghostwriter is back and wants to sell Hotel Transylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Song Remains Asleep/ Baby Got Hunchback
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia wants to replace the hotel's elevator music. Mavis and the gang uncover Quasimodo's secret recipe for dirt flambé.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis arranges a special celebration for Frankenstein and Eunice's anniver-scary. The wolf pups are out of control and Aunt Lydia puts Klaus in charge of caring for them.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Buggin' Out/ How Do You Solve a Problem Like Medusa
programme.desc: While doing her chores around the hotel, Mavis mistakes truth bugs for bed bugs. Mavis invites Lydia's high school rival to the hotel.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Breakfast at Lydia's/ The Trouble With Wendys
programme.desc: Mavis wins employee of the month and the right to share breakfast with Aunt Lydia. Later, Dr. Gillman saves Wendy's ponytail and now she's indebted to him.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Rise to Victory! Triumph Dragon!

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Holden's Manifesto

programme.title: Martin: Housekeeper From Hell
programme.desc: Martin and Gina are afraid to terminate their tough new housekeeper.

programme.title: Martin: Three Homies and a Baby
programme.desc: Martin, Bro'man and Sheneneh babysit Martin's infant nephew Cameron, which Martin quickly regrets agreeing to do.

programme.title: Martin: Headin' for Trouble
programme.desc: Gina gets her head stuck in their new brass headboard while making love to Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: Martin: Green Card
programme.desc: Pam agrees to marry the building superintendent when he's threatened with deportation, but her help comes at a price.

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: Martin: Kicked to the Curb
programme.desc: Martin and Gina end up homeless when their old apartment is sublet and the deal on the new one falls through . Desperate to recover their old place, they try to scare away the new tenants.

programme.title: Martin: The Best of Martin
programme.desc: Tisha Campbell hosts this clip show of the best of the last 99 episodes. Included are many of the special moments from the show, outtakes, and Tisha's own insight into the laughter behind the series.

programme.title: Martin: The Love Jones Connection
programme.desc: Sheneneh appears as a contestant on a dating game show and gets a lot more than a date.

programme.title: Martin: Where the Party At?
programme.desc: Martin gets a big surprise on his birthday - no one wants to come to his party.

programme.title: Martin: Homeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Martin steps in at a local production and does a homeboy version of Shakespeare's play.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: When her family goes bankrupt, a privileged city girl travels back to the country to try and fix up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment to get her money back.

programme.title: Movie: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A bride-to-be who is planning her wedding with a well-off doctor at a beautiful resort meets a charming local. She must decide which man she should be with: the man that can provide for her or the man that understands her.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts Down Under
programme.desc: A restaurateur inherits a cafe in Australia so she makes the big move. While there, she meets a charming local chef.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy is suffering from a mysterious fatigue syndrome that her doctors cannot identify.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a specialist, a Chinese virologist, who may have the key to her illness.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back
programme.desc: When the company that Rose's husband worked for, cuts off their pension plan, Rose must face the fact that she's going to get a new job, one that pays more.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Days of the Condo
programme.desc: When his request to install a doorknocker is denied, Frasier challenges the condo association president, Ms. Langer, by running against her in the election.

programme.title: Frasier: Death and the Dog
programme.desc: When Eddie becomes lethargic and refuses to eat, Martin tries everything to perk him up. He hires a dog psychiatrist to determine the cause of this depression.

programme.title: Frasier: Four for the Seesaw
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier's spontaneous gesture of sharing a table with two beautiful women leads them to a double date at a country cabin. Frasier then tries to help Niles overcome the feeling that he's betraying Maris.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead
programme.desc: Roz develops a reputation as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of at a retirement home dies on her. Meanwhile, Frasier ponders what effect his talk show has on people.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Reba: All Fore One
programme.desc: Reba encourages Brock to pursue his dream of playing professional golf.

programme.title: Reba: Hello, I Must Be Going

programme.title: Reba: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean clash over who is going to host the Thanksgiving dinner this year.

programme.title: Reba: No Boys Upstairs
programme.desc: Reba rethinks her decision to allow Kyra to spend time alone with her boyfriend.

programme.title: Reba: Diamond Jim Brady
programme.desc: When Van suffers a severe knee injury, the team awards him with a huge settlement.

programme.title: Reba: Reba and the Nanny
programme.desc: Reba learns that Van has hired a nanny so he can spend more time goofing off.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Have Yourself a Very Little Christmas
programme.desc: Christmas is driving everyone a little crazy as they all search for the perfect gifts.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Jamie Lee Curtis to share how she keeps a positive outlook on life. Chef Brad Miller is in our kitchen making one pot oven roasted halibut.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Kate Flannery. TV personality chef Judy Joo prepares a delicious lemon lavender yogurt loaf.

programme.title: Reba: Date of Mirth
programme.desc: Barbra Jean confesses to Reba that she has a serious crush on her marriage counsellor.

programme.title: Reba: Reba the Realtor
programme.desc: Brock reluctantly agrees to let Reba handle the sale of his precious condo.

programme.title: Reba: Flowers for Van

programme.title: Reba: Who Killed Brock

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated

programme.desc: A woman's dream job of captaining a dining cruise comes true, but she soon learns her ex-boyfriend is hired as the boat's chef. These two are forced to put their differences aside as they open a new business, and navigate the seas, with each other.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale

programme.desc: Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from moving to Athlead; Jim misses Cece's recital when a big investor visits his new company.

programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.desc: Sheldon struggles with newfound popularity after utilizing statistics to help the football team.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Patch, a Modem and a Zantac
programme.desc: When a NASA representative visits Sheldon's school and dismisses his science, Sheldon is set on a mission to prove him wrong.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount
programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Lots of Muddy Puddles/ Buttercups, Daisies, and Dandelions/ The Marble Run/ Mr. Potato Comes to Town
programme.desc: Peppa spends the day jumping in puddles. Cousin Chloe, Peppa, and George pick flowers. Peppa plays with the marble run. Peppa's town is excited to meet Mr. Potato. Madame Gazelle brings instruments into playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Peppa's Circus/ Night Animals/ Pirate Treasure/ Garden Games/ Going Boating
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden, and Peppa and her friends decide it’s a perfect place to put on a circus. Then, Peppa and George have stayed up late at Grandpa and Granny's to help hunt for slugs and snails.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Bubbles /Emily Elephant/ Polly’s Holiday
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing with bubbles; Peppa and her friends are at their playgroup today; Granny and Grandpa's pet comes to stay; Peppa and her family are having a picnic lunch; The family is watching their favourite show.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Grandpa's Toy Plane/ Mr. Bull's New Road
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes, and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Midnight Mile
programme.desc: It may be nighttime in Axle City, but all the trucks are staying up super late for the ultimate all-night race.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Toy Trouble!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Kitty Rescue Crew/ Pups Save an Ostrich
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger makes fake emergencies for his kitties to save so they appear better then the PAW Patrol. The Wingnuts get a new pet ostrich, but it gets lost on the trip home.

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas: Cecilia and the Magic Rubies/ Under the Pirate Moon
programme.desc: The crew goes underwater to stop Escarlata la Pirata from stealing Magic Rubies from Giant Clam Reef; Escarlata turns the moon into a fish.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Laugh With Blue
programme.desc: Josh is being silly but still can't get Blue to laugh. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what will make Blue laugh. While we look for clues we find patterns with a goofy gopher and locate all the mixed-up things in Silly Town.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Video Game Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are super excited to play their new video game. When a video game wizard makes the game come alive, Blaze and AJ must level up and save Axle City from pixel pandemonium.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Sleep Walking Bear / Pups Save Dude Ranch Danny
programme.desc: An ice sculpture turns out to be a hibernating bear. / Pups must rescue Daring Danny.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Trash-Dinger/ Pups Save the Royal Armor
programme.desc: A tech-savvy 10-year-old boy leads a pack of six heroic puppies in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Snowshoeing Goodways/ Pups Save a Duck Pond
programme.desc: When Mayor Goodway and the twins are late getting back from a snowshoeing, Jake and Everest call the PAW Patrol to search for them.When water in the duck pond mysteriously drains out, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find out what's happening.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups and the Big Twin Trick/ Pups Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: The Ladybird is up to her old tricks again, but this time the Mighty Twins have a super trick of their own. Mayor Humdinger finally gets super powers, and it's a total cat-astrophe.

programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton's Old Chum/ Stormy Weather
programme.desc: The place that Plankton usually dumps his rotten chum is too full, so he tricks SpongeBob into hiding it around the city.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: My Way or the Highway
programme.desc: During a spring store, Steve cleans up a fuel spill blocking the 400, while Sonny struggles to keep the alternate route moving; John Allen recovers a loaded semi that went for a wild airborne ride.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Worlds Apart

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Wood or Won't

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers: Break Up

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Jellyfish

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Gators and Ice Tsunami

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving Animal Attacks
programme.desc: Jaw-dropping animal videos show how weather affects moose, wild turkeys and vicious reef sharks. What to do when a 7000-pound whale drags you deep into the ocean and how to respond when a raging buffalo charges is featured.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Gulf of Mexico Monster

programme.title: Storage Wars: From Dust 'Til Dawn

programme.title: Storage Wars: An Auction Too Far
programme.desc: A tough start in Santa Ana leads to a long day, as the buyers hit a second auction in Hawaiian Gardens, in hopes of finding a great locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mo' Money, Mo' Valley
programme.desc: Lockers go for big bucks as the buyers hit auctions in Moreno Valley, California. Ivy and Dave duke it out for a pair of units while Mary tries to avoid the shrapnel. One buyer hits it big with a twice-in-a-lifetime find that provides over $10K in profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Lock, Stock and One Smoking Darrell

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Fists fly when a quiet Michigan courtroom erupts into an all-out melee; a pro-pot defendant lights up right in front of a judge; a tension-filled husband and wife murder trial ends with a shocking verdict; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convict makes a surprise attack; the Portland MAX killer lashes out in court; a defendant trying to escape court gets stopped by a bulletproof window.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A stalker tries to take his own life in the courtroom, the family of a murder victim attempts to get revenge, and a judge throws the book at teen murder suspects.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An overdose occurs in a court bathroom, an arsonist loses his cool and a judge shocks the courtroom and the defendant with a creative punishment.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge takes a bullet and fires back, and a defendant tries to charm his way out of jail. Then, a woman provides testimony to send her boyfriend to prison for life.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A Massachusetts courtroom erupts in a storm of fists and f-bombs, a judge pays the price for outrageous behavior and a doctor appears for a zoom hearing during surgery.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime: Get Out of My House
programme.desc: A deadly shootout ensues when intruders wake up sleeping homeowners, and a model and her husband are robbed at gunpoint. Plus, a man in his yard holds armed robber at bay with a machete.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime: Assaulted at Work
programme.desc: A disgruntled renter shoots an apartment manager, and a fast food worker is assaulted by an unhinged customer. Plus, a bar owner chokes his employee.

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hellcopter
programme.desc: The joker that required medical attention during the fat foot race punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Spaghetti and Meatballs Episode
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal dine and discuss their lives. Find out what's on the menu and whether they'll ever actually cook tenderloin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Shane Ray vs. Michael the Fan
programme.desc: Super Bowl Champ Shane Ray uses some sick moves at a hospital, and Olympic Gold Medalist Summer Sanders wants to help a fan make a big splash.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Connor Fields vs. Taina the Fan
programme.desc: Josh Norman goes undercover again to talk about how much he hates Josh Norman, and one fan gets a wild ride with BMX legend Connor Fields.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Boxing Boys
programme.desc: Ree bakes fruity granola chocolate chip cookies and prepares a dinner of Italian sloppy Joes with delicious garlic toast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Deli Deliberation

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Pizza Ree-A

programme.desc: Five people meet up and attempt to survive a night in Los Angeles where, as a means of population control, all crime is sanctioned for a span of 12 hours.

programme.title: Movie: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: When a ruthless sultan threatens the lives of his wife and son, a young prince is willing to go to great lengths to keep them safe. An encounter in a cave, high up in the mountain, turns him into the legendary vampire, Dracula.

programme.title: Good Bones: First House on the Block
programme.desc: Mina and Karen renovate the first of several houses they purchased on Talbott Street in Indianapolis. The three-bedroom, one-bath home has architectural challenges including a foundation that sags causing the floor to slope.

programme.title: Good Bones: Nothing's Easy on East Street
programme.desc: After going underwater on previous East Street investments, Mina and Karen return and hope their third flip is a charm. They plan to give a home more bathrooms and an open floor plan, but Cory discovers a budget-busting water line issue.

programme.title: Good Bones: Chelsea Vibes in Old Southside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are in Old Southside, but this time they're working in a transitional area. They've purchased a duplex of townhomes that will need both sides renovated, but for now they're focusing on the left side.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Nest Egg Reno
programme.desc: A daughter begs Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. Using a few of their tricks, the twins change its dated and choppy layout by opening up the home and giving it a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: House Hunters: King of the Ohio Suburbs
programme.desc: Empty nesters are looking for different things and can't agree on a new home in Columbus, Ohio. She's looking for a smaller place near the city that's walking distance to work, but he thinks they need more room and wants a larger house in the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Meet Me in San Miguel de Allende
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are excited to rekindle their romance in San Miguel de Allende, Mexico. Their second shot at love is full of potential, but they'll have to relearn and recalibrate before they can finally settle into their first home together.

programme.title: House Hunters: Country Life for Family of Seven in Georgia
programme.desc: A family of seven relocates for a job opportunity and looks for a new home in Atlanta. She wants something move-in ready with a lot of land for a potential farm, but he prefers a home that's impressive and grand, and doesn't mind projects to save money.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Lake or No Lake in Geneva
programme.desc: After accepting a job promotion, a wife and mother relocates her family of six to Geneva. They're looking for a spacious house with at least four bedrooms, and she's money conscious, but he doesn't mind spending more to get the lake view he really wants.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Mid-Mod Oasis
programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Putting Down Roots in Georgia
programme.desc: A military family that's used to moving with little notice receives his latest post orders. They hope to find a forever home in Georgia where they can settle down when he retires in six years.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Moving Our Crazy Little Troop
programme.desc: First-time homebuyers Jeremy and Stacey have just one weekend to find the perfect home before the Army moves them from Fort Bragg to Fort Lee. They struggle to find a good fit for their active, growing family of three kids and two dogs.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Financial Freedom in Fort Worth
programme.desc: A woman gets to live her dream of being a stay-at-home mom when her husband lands a new job in Fort Worth, TX. However, he must start his new position immediately and they are in a rush to find their forever home.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Coming Together in Carolina
programme.desc: Ten years ago, a blended family of six moved into a townhome in Charleston, South Carolina, but a new job opportunity has them heading to Greensboro, North Carolina. In one weekend, they must find a home that fits both their large family and tight budget.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Under the Same Roof in Ft. Lee
programme.desc: A couple who met in boot camp are now married with an expanding family. They have finally received orders to the same military base in Virginia, but being stationed in two different states will make finding their new home in a speedy market tricky.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Finding Space Off Base
programme.desc: A family is relocating from Virginia to Millington, Tennessee, in four weeks, but Mom will be too busy attending Officer Training School to help with the move. They have to find the perfect home for two kids and five fur babies before she ships off!

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Gearing Up for Georgia
programme.desc: A couple has lived in their California home for 11 years, but now they've received a dream job offer in Georgia, where they have family ties. With their house under contract, these perfectionists must find a home that meets their needs in two days.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Joining the Force in Mesa
programme.desc: The pressure is building for a couple that's moving to Mesa, AZ, with their two kids so he can start police academy training in just three weeks. When they enter a bidding war for their top choice, they must scramble to find a solution.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Hot Market in Atlanta
programme.desc: Jenn and Ryan have already relocated several times for work, but with their two children now in high school, a move from Seattle to Atlanta could be the hardest one yet. With Ryan on the road more than at home, they have just two days to find a home.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Carolina Is Calling
programme.desc: A couple who wanted to live in North Carolina was rocked by the recession and moved to Oregon instead. Twelve years and two kids later, they're trying again, but with their current home under contract, they have no time to spare in finding a new place.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Italianate Charm
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier get the opportunity to find and restore a home for some long-time friends. They're hoping to find a historical house with a porch and cozy charm.

programme.title: Home Town: A Little Rough, a Little Refined
programme.desc: Caroline and her husband, Corey, are moving home to follow her dream of opening a men's store. With a budget of $150,000, they're hoping to find a house that matches their authentic, early-century style and has an office worthy of their new business.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: Moving to Main Street
programme.desc: A woman wants to downsize and move into town to be closer to friends and work. With her all-in budget of $125,000, she hopes to find a small home with a maintenance-free yard, a master bathroom, and space for her son.

programme.title: Home Town: Inspired By the Sea
programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: There's Just Something About a Porch
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a historic home in the country with a porch and plenty of green space. Ben and Erin transform their new home into a classic, dogtrot-style house full of historic charm and Southern touches.

programme.desc: Four smiths crack open crucibles to reveal surprise metals they'll use to forge signature blades. The two surviving smiths move on to their home forges to recreate the legendary sword of King Charlemagne: the Joyeuse.

programme.desc: Tennis pro Guy Haines, who feels trapped in his marriage, meets a stranger aboard a train who proposes a set of perfect murders. Guy assumes that the stranger is only talking in hypothetical terms, but then his wife is found strangled to death.

programme.title: Movie: The Stratton Story

programme.desc: After a bout with polio, future president Franklin Roosevelt fights to save his political career.

programme.title: Movie: The Sunshine Boys

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Bird of Youth

programme.title: Movie: Swing Time
programme.desc: To prove himself worthy of his fiancee, a dancer tries to make it big, only to fall for his dancing partner.

programme.title: Movie: A Tale of Two Cities
programme.desc: During the French Revolution, a lawyer and an aristocrat both fall for the same woman.

programme.title: Movie: Test Pilot
programme.desc: An aviator attempting a transcontinental flight record falls in love and loses his job.

programme.title: Bunk'd: An Udder Disaster
programme.desc: Finn offers to care for Lou's beloved cow Bessie but must prove he can handle the responsibility. Meanwhile, Destiny and Gwen concoct a plan to patch things up between Ava and her mother.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Hot Spring Friend Machine
programme.desc: Lou helps Gwen build her confidence when she learns that her parents plan to send her to school at the end of the summer. Ava discovers a hot spring at Camp Kikiwaka and enlists Noah to keep it a secret.

programme.title: Jessie: Beauty and the Beasts
programme.desc: At a pageant, Jesse runs into her nemesis Nanny Agatha. Luke and Ravi play practical jokes on Bertram.

programme.title: Jessie: Creepy Connie's Curtain Call
programme.desc: Jessie writes a play to be produced at the kids' school, but to Luke's shock, she's cast Creepy Connie as his love interest. Meanwhile, Zuri job-shadows Bertram for her school report.

programme.title: Jessie: We Are So Grounded
programme.desc: Jessie, Bertram and the kids head to Bali for a family vacation, but when their private jet starts to fail, Jessie takes control of the cockpit and makes an emergency landing on a tropical island.

programme.title: Jessie: The Secret Life of Mr. Kipling
programme.desc: After finding a nest of eggs on the terrace, Jessie and Ravi discover that Mr. Kipling is really Ms. Kipling, and a mom-to-be. After misplacing her eggs, Ravi realizes he may have to work at becoming a better grandparent to baby lizards.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Big Resolution/ Winter Greens
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Cricket insists on helping Gloria complete her resolution of approaching her long-time crush, Kevin. Cricket and Remy challenge Vasquez to a snowball fight, while Tilly creates a snowperson.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Date Night/ The Room
programme.desc: Bill chaperones Cricket and Gabriella's first date. Then, Tilly closes up Cricket's secret escape hole in their room, sparking a conflict that leads them to splitting the room down the middle.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cramped Champions

programme.title: Jessie: Lights, Camera, Distraction!

programme.title: Jessie: The Telltale Duck
programme.desc: Jessie agrees to accompany Bertram to his high school reunion, so he can show his former classmates how successful he has become.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: Wealthy residents felt safe in their gated community but it was not safe for one millionaire, murdered in his waterfront home. Police investigated but the case grew cold. Turned out the key to solving it, or two keys, were right at the front door.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Wasn't There
programme.desc: He was the hardworking dad, she the doting mom. In the still of the night, strangers armed with knives destroyed all they had built together. Turns out, someone was hiding an ugly secret. Police would hatch an elaborate plan to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Deadly Path
programme.desc: When a woman falls to her death while hiking with her husband in Rocky Mountain National Park, rangers question if her death was an accident or a heinous act of violence.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A successful, seemingly healthy doctor collapses at home and is rushed to the ER, leaving friends and colleagues puzzled. When her blood test reveals what killed her, the case goes from a medical mystery to murder mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Englewood Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police are investigating the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot. Evidence indicates there is one offender, now police need to locate him.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Classified to Kill
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe a serial killer is using the classified ads to lure and murder his victims. The investigation is set ablaze when flames obliterate evidence, until police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Snapped: Tanasha Siena
programme.desc: A 17-year relationship ends in gunfire, leaving two children fatherless.

programme.title: Snapped: Deborah Huiett
programme.desc: The discovery of an unidentified woman’s decomposed body in a roadside ditch leads to a mystery that unravels a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Michele Donohue
programme.desc: She said her husband ran away with his much younger mistress, but after years of suspicion, police find him much closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secret Lives
programme.desc: Missing wife, grieving husband; turns out, both had secrets. Jen Ramsaran vanished just before Christmas and detectives needed to know if her online life held the key to this mystery or if the answer was closer to home.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: Lisa and Kevin Knoefel seemed like the perfect couple. They were busy raising three children, and then welcomed a foster child too. When Sabrina admitted to killing Lisa, no one could understand why. This case was about to get very complicated.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job
programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes
programme.desc: A weekend trip to an Alaskan lodge turns deadly for a young mother when she's shot and killed by her boyfriend. The death is ruled an accident and the case is closed until an eerily similar incident in Montana drives investigators to reopen the case.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Movie: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen are forced into a new mission by a tech prodigy. They must attempt to steal a heavily guarded computer chip, which is considered an impossible heist. If they succeed, they can clear their names and discover the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Man and the 'C' Student
programme.desc: Convinced old people are young at heart, Bart takes a group of seniors on an adventure.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Can't Buy Me Love
programme.desc: Mr. Burns attempts to gain popularity and fame by showering Springfield with money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: They Saved Lisa's Brain
programme.desc: Homer gets everyone to embrace humiliation in order to win a contest; Lisa joins MENSA.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thirty Minutes Over Tokyo

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beyond Blunderdome
programme.desc: Homer gives his honest opinion to Mel Gibson at a test screening of Mel's new film.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Guess Who's Coming to Criticize Dinner?
programme.desc: Homer asks Lisa for help when he becomes the food critic for The Springfield Shopper.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Disney's the Reboot
